title: Factor out AST_CELL handling in genrtlil.cc into a helper function
body:
This is a staging commit for a following commit that adds bind
support. Since the bind construct also instantiates cells, we end up
needing exactly the same logic (but we'll be filling in a Cell object
living somewhere slightly different).

(Note: This patch is part of the larger queue at https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/pull/2752. The idea is to split things out to avoid having a giant PR to review all at once)
